meta.title: Alexander Beck — Product Design, User Experience, Creative Technology — London
meta.description: Alexander Beck designs product experiences and systems from London. Product design, experience strategy, and creative technology from concept to build.

edge.tagline: Product design, experience strategy, and creative technology from London—where aesthetics meet intent and every interaction is built to feel inevitable.

items.label: Product Systems
items.tooltip: I structure product platforms so they stay flexible and measurable as demand changes.

items.label: Interaction Design
items.tooltip: I design motion and interfaces that guide behaviour on screen and in physical touchpoints.

items.label: Creative Technology
items.tooltip: I build digital experiences with code—from the web to spatial and emerging screens—so they stay consistent and usable.

items.label: Applied AI
items.tooltip: I use AI in the loop: new workflows, faster exploration, and clearer choices for product teams.

items.label: Experience Strategy
items.tooltip: I align product, story, and platforms so the experience stays consistent and easy to ship.

items.label: Art Direction
items.tooltip: I set visual direction so spatial, motion, and identity work together and the story is clear.

items.label: Prototyping
items.tooltip: I prototype fast to surface learnings, validate ideas, and align teams.

philosophy.textBeforeLink: The most interesting work happens where disciplines overlap. I design at the intersection of systems, interaction, and technology, using craft and AI to shape clear, usable experiences that are ready to ship.

portfolio.blurb: Selected work across finance, luxury, and frontier tech—projects I've directed, led, or built with teams. Currently designing for neurodivergent users.

cv.title: About me
cv.description: A lightweight invite in the browser, not secure auth. If I gave you a code, enter it here. Otherwise get in touch and I'll send the CV.

portfolio.description: A lightweight invite in the browser, not secure auth. If I gave you a code, enter it here. Otherwise get in touch and I'll send portfolio access.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Product design, AI prototyping, and creative technology. Get in touch for collaborations or job opportunities.
